allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force E:\\Working\\ELearning | Select-Object Name, Length; "---node---"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node -v 2>$null; "---npm---"; npm -v 2>$null; "---docker---"; docker -v 2>$null)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'docker|com.docker|vpnkit|wsl' } | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; "--- WSL ---"; wsl --status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
